name: Nirvana
awards: Grammy Award for Best Alternative Music Album (1996)
description: An icon of 90s grunge, known for dark lyrics and powerful sound. Their album 'Nevermind' became a cultural phenomenon.

name: Radiohead
awards: Grammy Award for Best Alternative Music Album (2001, 2009)
description: Innovators who redefined rock music. Their sound blends electronic elements, art rock, and philosophical lyrics.

name: Pearl Jam
awards: Grammy Award for Best Hard Rock Performance (1996)
description: One of the key bands of the grunge scene. Known for Vedder’s powerful vocals and socially conscious lyrics.

name: Red Hot Chili Peppers
awards: Grammy Award for Best Rock Song (2007)
description: A fusion of funk, punk, and psychedelia. Famous for energetic performances and charismatic members.

name: Oasis
awards: BRIT Award for Best British Album (1996)
description: A legend of 90s Britpop. Their anthems became the soundtrack of a generation.
